OrganizationSummaries.description: The overview of owned organizations presented as a list of organization summaries.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. The value is "null" when there are no more results to return.

DefaultMailDomain.description: The default email domain associated with the organization.

ErrorMessage.description: The error message associated with the organization. It is only present if unexpected behavior has occurred with regards to the organization. It provides insight or solutions regarding unexpected behavior.

Token.description: The authentication token for the impersonation role.

ApplicationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the application.

MobileDeviceAccessRuleId.description: The identifier for the newly created mobile device access rule.

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM Role associated with the email monitoring configuration.

LogGroupArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the CloudWatch Log group associated with the email monitoring configuration.

EntityId.description: The entity ID under which the entity exists.

Name.description: Username, GroupName, or ResourceName based on entity type.

State.description: The state of the user: enabled (registered to WorkMail) or disabled (deregistered or never registered to WorkMail).

EnabledDate.description: The date and time when a user was registered to WorkMail, in UNIX epoch time format.

DisabledDate.description: The date and time when a user was deregistered from WorkMail, in UNIX epoch time format.

HiddenFromGlobalAddressList.description: If the value is set to true, the group is hidden from the address book.

AuthenticationMode.description: The authentication mode used in WorkMail.

IdentityCenterConfiguration.description: The details of the IAM Identity Center configuration.

PersonalAccessTokenConfiguration.description: The details of the Personal Access Token configuration.

InstanceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the of IAM Identity Center instance. Must be in the same AWS account and region as WorkMail organization.

ApplicationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of IAMIdentity Center Application for WorkMail. Must be created by the WorkMail API, see CreateIdentityCenterApplication.

Enforced.description: Lists the enforcement setting of the applied policy.

EntityId.description: The identifier of the user or resource associated with the mailbox.

RoleArn.description: The ARN of the AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) role that grants write permission to the Amazon Simple Storage Service (Amazon S3) bucket.

KmsKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the symmetric AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key that encrypts the exported mailbox content.

S3Path.description: The path to the S3 bucket and file that the mailbox export job is exporting to.

EstimatedProgress.description: The estimated progress of the mailbox export job, in percentage points.

State.description: The state of the mailbox export job.

ErrorInfo.description: Error information for failed mailbox export jobs.

DirectoryId.description: The identifier for the directory associated with an WorkMail organization.

DirectoryType.description: The type of directory associated with the WorkMail organization.

DefaultMailDomain.description: The default mail domain associated with the organization.

CompletedDate.description: The date at which the organization became usable in the WorkMail context, in UNIX epoch time format.

ErrorMessage.description: (Optional) The error message indicating if unexpected behavior was encountered with regards to the organization.

ARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the organization.

MigrationAdmin.description: The user ID of the migration admin if migration is enabled for the organization.

InteroperabilityEnabled.description: Indicates if interoperability is enabled for this organization.

BookingOptions.description: The booking options for the described resource.

State.description: The state of the resource: enabled (registered to WorkMail), disabled (deregistered or never registered to WorkMail), or deleted.

EnabledDate.description: The date and time when a resource was enabled for WorkMail, in UNIX epoch time format.

DisabledDate.description: The date and time when a resource was disabled from WorkMail, in UNIX epoch time format.

HiddenFromGlobalAddressList.description: If enabled, the resource is hidden from the global address list.

AutoAcceptRequests.description: The resource's ability to automatically reply to requests. If disabled, delegates must be associated to the resource.

AutoDeclineRecurringRequests.description: The resource's ability to automatically decline any recurring requests.

AutoDeclineConflictingRequests.description: The resource's ability to automatically decline any conflicting requests.

State.description: The state of a user: enabled (registered to WorkMail) or disabled (deregistered or never registered to WorkMail).

UserRole.description: In certain cases, other entities are modeled as users. If interoperability is enabled, resources are imported into WorkMail as users. Because different WorkMail organizations rely on different directory types, administrators can distinguish between an unregistered user (account is disabled and has a user role) and the directory administrators. The values are USER, RESOURCE, SYSTEM_USER, and REMOTE_USER.

EnabledDate.description: The date and time at which the user was enabled for WorkMailusage, in UNIX epoch time format.

DisabledDate.description: The date and time at which the user was disabled for WorkMail usage, in UNIX epoch time format.

MailboxProvisionedDate.description: The date when the mailbox was created for the user.

MailboxDeprovisionedDate.description: The date when the mailbox was removed for the user.

HiddenFromGlobalAddressList.description: If enabled, the user is hidden from the global address list.

IdentityProviderUserId.description: User ID from the IAM Identity Center. If this parameter is empty it will be updated automatically when the user logs in for the first time to the mailbox associated with WorkMail.

IdentityProviderIdentityStoreId.description: Identity Store ID from the IAM Identity Center. If this parameter is empty it will be updated automatically when the user logs in for the first time to the mailbox associated with WorkMail.

MatchedRules.description: The rules that match the given parameters, resulting in an effect.

Action.description: The action to take on the folder contents at the end of the folder configuration period.

Period.description: The number of days for which the folder-configuration action applies.

Rules.description: The list of rules for the given impersonation role.

DateCreated.description: The date when the impersonation role was created.

DateModified.description: The date when the impersonation role was last modified.

Effect.description: The effect of the rule when it matches the input. Allowed effect values are ALLOW or DENY.

TargetUsers.description: A list of user IDs that match the rule.

NotTargetUsers.description: A list of user IDs that don't match the rule.

Effect.description: Effect of the impersonation role on the target user based on its rules. Available effects are ALLOW or DENY.

MatchedRules.description: A list of the rules that match the input and produce the configured effect.

ImpersonationRuleId.description: The ID of the rule that matched the input

Name.description: The name of the rule that matched the input.

Records.description: A list of the DNS records that WorkMail recommends adding in your DNS provider for the best user experience. The records configure your domain with DMARC, SPF, DKIM, and direct incoming email traffic to SES. See admin guide for more details.

IsTestDomain.description: Specifies whether the domain is a test domain provided by WorkMail, or a custom domain.

IsDefault.description: Specifies whether the domain is the default domain for your organization.

OwnershipVerificationStatus.description: Indicates the status of the domain ownership verification.

DkimVerificationStatus.description: Indicates the status of a DKIM verification.

Value.description: The value returned by the DNS for a query to that hostname and record type.

MailboxQuota.description: The maximum allowed mailbox size, in MB, for the specified user.

MailboxSize.description: The current mailbox size, in MB, for the specified user.

Effect.description: The effect of the simulated access, ALLOW or DENY, after evaluating mobile device access rules in the WorkMail organization for the simulated user parameters.

MatchedRules.description: A list of the rules which matched the simulated user input and produced the effect.

MobileDeviceAccessRuleId.description: Identifier of the rule that a simulated user matches.

Name.description: Name of a rule that a simulated user matches.

UserId.description: The WorkMail user to which the access override applies.

DeviceId.description: The device to which the access override applies.

DateCreated.description: The date the override was first created.

DateModified.description: The date the description was last modified.

DateCreated.description: The date when the Personal Access Token ID was created.

DateLastUsed.description: The date when the Personal Access Token ID was last used.

ExpiresTime.description: The time when the Personal Access Token ID will expire.

Scopes.description: Lists all the Personal Access Token permissions for a mailbox.

IpRanges.description: IPv4 CIDR ranges to include in the rule.

NotIpRanges.description: IPv4 CIDR ranges to exclude from the rule.

Actions.description: Access protocol actions to include in the rule. Valid values include ActiveSync, AutoDiscover, EWS, IMAP, SMTP, WindowsOutlook, and WebMail.

NotActions.description: Access protocol actions to exclude from the rule. Valid values include ActiveSync, AutoDiscover, EWS, IMAP, SMTP, WindowsOutlook, and WebMail.

UserIds.description: User IDs to include in the rule.

NotUserIds.description: User IDs to exclude from the rule.

DateCreated.description: The date that the rule was created.

DateModified.description: The date that the rule was modified.

ImpersonationRoleIds.description: Impersonation role IDs to include in the rule.

NotImpersonationRoleIds.description: Impersonation role IDs to exclude from the rule.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. The value is "null" when there are no more results to return.

AvailabilityConfigurations.description: The list of AvailabilityConfiguration's that exist for the specified WorkMail organization.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. The value is null when there are no further results to return.

DomainName.description: Displays the domain to which the provider applies.

ProviderType.description: Displays the provider type that applies to this domain.

EwsProvider.description: If ProviderType is EWS, then this field contains RedactedEwsAvailabilityProvider. Otherwise, it is not required.

EwsEndpoint.description: The endpoint of the remote EWS server.

EwsUsername.description: The username used to authenticate the remote EWS server.

LambdaProvider.description: If ProviderType is LAMBDA then this field contains LambdaAvailabilityProvider. Otherwise, it is not required.

LambdaArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Lambda that acts as the availability provider.

DateCreated.description: The date and time at which the availability configuration was created.

DateModified.description: The date and time at which the availability configuration was last modified.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. The first call does not contain any tokens.

Type.description: A member can be a user or group.

State.description: The state of the member, which can be ENABLED, DISABLED, or DELETED.

EnabledDate.description: The date indicating when the member was enabled for WorkMail use.

DisabledDate.description: The date indicating when the member was disabled from WorkMail use.

Groups.description: The overview of groups for an organization.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. The value is "null" when there are no more results to return.

State.description: The state of the group, which can be ENABLED, DISABLED, or DELETED.

EnabledDate.description: The date indicating when the group was enabled for WorkMail use.

DisabledDate.description: The date indicating when the group was disabled from WorkMail use.

Groups.description: The overview of groups in an organization.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. This value is `null` when there are no more results to return.

Roles.description: The list of impersonation roles under the given WorkMail organization.

NextToken.description: The token to retrieve the next page of results. The value is null when there are no results to return.

DateCreated.description: The date when the impersonation role was created.

DateModified.description: The date when the impersonation role was last modified.

MailDomains.description: The list of mail domain summaries, specifying domains that exist in the specified WorkMail organization, along with the information about whether the domain is or isn't the default.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. The value becomes null when there are no more results to return.

DefaultDomain.description: Whether the domain is default or not.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results.

JobId.description: The identifier of the mailbox export job.

EntityId.description: The identifier of the user or resource associated with the mailbox.

S3Path.description: The path to the S3 bucket and file that the mailbox export job exports to.

EstimatedProgress.description: The estimated progress of the mailbox export job, in percentage points.

State.description: The state of the mailbox export job.

Permissions.description: One page of the user, group, or resource mailbox permissions.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. The value is "null" when there are no more results to return.

GranteeId.description: The identifier of the user, group, or resource to which the permissions are granted.

GranteeType.description: The type of user, group, or resource referred to in GranteeId.

PermissionValues.description: The permissions granted to the grantee. SEND_AS allows the grantee to send email as the owner of the mailbox (the grantee is not mentioned on these emails). SEND_ON_BEHALF allows the grantee to send email on behalf of the owner of the mailbox (the grantee is not mentioned as the physical sender of these emails). FULL_ACCESS allows the grantee full access to the mailbox, irrespective of other folder-level permissions set on the mailbox.

Overrides.description: The list of mobile device access overrides that exist for the specified WorkMail organization and user.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. The value is “null” when there are no more results to return.

UserId.description: The WorkMail user to which the access override applies.

DeviceId.description: The device to which the override applies.

DateCreated.description: The date the override was first created.

DateModified.description: The date the override was last modified.

Rules.description: The list of mobile device access rules that exist under the specified WorkMail organization.

MobileDeviceAccessRuleId.description: The ID assigned to a mobile access rule.

Name.description: The name of a mobile access rule.

Description.description: The description of a mobile access rule.

Effect.description: The effect of the rule when it matches. Allowed values are ALLOW or DENY.

DeviceTypes.description: Device types that a rule will match.

NotDeviceTypes.description: Device types that a rule will not match. All other device types will match.

DeviceModels.description: Device models that a rule will match.

NotDeviceModels.description: Device models that a rule will not match. All other device models will match.

DeviceOperatingSystems.description: Device operating systems that a rule will match.

NotDeviceOperatingSystems.description: Device operating systems that a rule will not match. All other device types will match.

DeviceUserAgents.description: Device user agents that a rule will match.

NotDeviceUserAgents.description: Device user agents that a rule will not match. All other device user agents will match.

DateCreated.description: The date and time at which an access rule was created.

DateModified.description: The date and time at which an access rule was modified.

NextToken.description: The token from the previous response to query the next page.

PersonalAccessTokenSummaries.description: Lists all the personal tokens in an organization or user, if user ID is provided.

PersonalAccessTokenId.description: The ID of the Personal Access Token.

UserId.description: The user ID of the WorkMail user associated with the Personal Access Token.

Name.description: The name of the Personal Access Token.

DateCreated.description: The date when the Personal Access Token was created.

DateLastUsed.description: The date when the Personal Access Token was last used.

ExpiresTime.description: The date when the Personal Access Token will expire.

Scopes.description: Lists all the Personal Access Token permissions for a mailbox.

NextToken.description: The token used to paginate through the delegates associated with a resource. While results are still available, it has an associated value. When the last page is reached, the token is empty.

Id.description: The identifier for the user or group associated as the resource's delegate.

Type.description: The type of the delegate: user or group.

Resources.description: One page of the organization's resource representation.

NextToken.description: The token used to paginate through all the organization's resources. While results are still available, it has an associated value. When the last page is reached, the token is empty.

Type.description: The type of the resource: equipment or room.

State.description: The state of the resource, which can be ENABLED, DISABLED, or DELETED.

EnabledDate.description: The date indicating when the resource was enabled for WorkMail use.

DisabledDate.description: The date indicating when the resource was disabled from WorkMail use.

Users.description: The overview of users for an organization.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. This value is `null` when there are no more results to return.

State.description: The state of the user, which can be ENABLED, DISABLED, or DELETED.

EnabledDate.description: The date indicating when the user was enabled for WorkMail use.

DisabledDate.description: The date indicating when the user was disabled from WorkMail use.

IdentityProviderUserId.description: User ID from the IAM Identity Center. If this parameter is empty it will be updated automatically when the user logs in for the first time to the mailbox associated with WorkMail.

IdentityProviderIdentityStoreId.description: Identity store ID from the IAM Identity Center. If this parameter is empty it will be updated automatically when the user logs in for the first time to the mailbox associated with WorkMail.

TestPassed.description: Boolean indicating whether the test passed or failed.

FailureReason.description: String containing the reason for a failed test if TestPassed is false.
